creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you paste the /var/log/messages segment? I wonder how is the probed,
and if it creates /dev/ugen* nodes.

The gphoto devs suggest to just use umass in system...

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Canada is a country whose main exports are hockey players and cold fronts.
Our main imports are baseball players and acid rain.
  -- Pierre Elliott Trudeau
